entries.question: How do I enroll in a course?
entries.answer: Browse our course catalog, select your desired course, and click 'Enroll Now'. You can pay immediately or start a free trial if available. Enrollment is instant and you'll receive immediate access to course materials.

entries.question: What are the prerequisites for enrollment?
entries.answer: Prerequisites vary by course. Check the 'Requirements' section on each course page. Most introductory courses have no prerequisites. Advanced courses may require completion of foundational courses.

entries.question: Can I enroll in multiple courses at once?
entries.answer: Yes! You can enroll in unlimited courses simultaneously. We recommend starting with 1-2 courses if you're new to online learning. Your enrollment never expires for completed courses.

entries.question: How do I create a student account?
entries.answer: Click 'Sign Up' on our homepage. Enter your email, create a password, and verify your email address. You can also sign up using Google, LinkedIn, or Microsoft accounts.

entries.question: Is there an age requirement?
entries.answer: Students must be at least 13 years old to create an account. Students under 18 need parental consent. Some professional certification courses require you to be 18+.

entries.question: How long do I have access to a course?
entries.answer: You have lifetime access to all purchased courses, including future updates. If a course is retired, you'll retain access to the archived version.

entries.question: Are courses self-paced?
entries.answer: Most courses are self-paced, allowing you to learn on your schedule. Some programs include live sessions or cohort-based learning with set schedules. Check the course details.

entries.question: What if a course is too difficult?
entries.answer: We offer 30-day money-back guarantee if a course isn't right for you. You can also access prerequisite courses, discussion forums, and instructor office hours for additional help.

entries.question: Can I download course videos?
entries.answer: Yes! Most courses allow video downloads through our mobile app for offline viewing. Desktop downloading is not available due to content protection policies.

entries.question: How do I contact an instructor?
entries.answer: Use the Q&A section within each course to ask questions. Instructors typically respond within 24-48 hours. Premium courses may include direct messaging or office hours.

entries.question: What payment methods do you accept?
entries.answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. We also offer payment plans through Affirm for courses over $100.

entries.question: Do you offer financial aid?
entries.answer: Yes! We offer need-based scholarships covering 25-100% of course fees. Apply through the Financial Aid link on any course page. Applications are reviewed within 7 days.

entries.question: What is your refund policy?
entries.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all courses. No questions asked. Refunds are processed within 5-10 business days to your original payment method.

entries.question: Can I get an invoice for my employer?
entries.answer: Yes! After purchase, go to 'My Account' > 'Purchase History' to download invoices. We can also provide custom invoices with your company details. Contact support for assistance.

entries.question: Are there any hidden fees?
entries.answer: No hidden fees! The listed price includes all course materials, updates, and certificate. Optional add-ons like 1-on-1 tutoring are clearly marked and not required.

entries.question: How do I earn a certificate?
entries.answer: Complete all required lessons and assignments in a course. Most courses require 100% completion. You'll receive your certificate immediately upon completion.

entries.question: Are certificates recognized?
entries.answer: Our certificates are recognized by industry employers. We're DEAC accredited, and many courses prepare you for industry certifications (AWS, Google, Microsoft, etc.).

entries.question: How do I share my certificate?
entries.answer: Download your certificate as PDF or share directly to LinkedIn. Each certificate has a unique verification URL that employers can use to verify authenticity.

entries.question: Can I get a printed certificate?
entries.answer: Yes! We offer premium printed certificates on professional paper for $25. Order through 'My Certificates' and we'll ship worldwide within 10 business days.

entries.question: What if I lose my certificate?
entries.answer: Your certificates are stored permanently in your account. Simply log in and redownload anytime. Contact support if you need help accessing your account.

entries.question: How do I contact support?
entries.answer: Email support@edulearn-academy.edu, use live chat (available 8am-8pm EST), or submit a ticket through 'Help Center'. Average response time is under 2 hours.

entries.question: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
entries.answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page. Enter your email and we'll send a reset link. Check your spam folder if you don't receive it within 5 minutes.

entries.question: How do I update my profile?
entries.answer: Log in and go to 'My Account' > 'Profile'. Update your name, email, photo, and bio. Changes are saved automatically. Your profile is visible to instructors only.

entries.question: Is my personal information secure?
entries.answer: Absolutely! We're FERPA compliant and use 256-bit SSL encryption. Your data is never sold. Read our Privacy Policy for details on data protection.

entries.question: How do I delete my account?
entries.answer: Go to 'My Account' > 'Settings' > 'Delete Account'. This will permanently remove your data and cancel any active subscriptions. Certificate records are retained for verification purposes.
